notice.metaDescription: Legal notice of AFV Cocinas. Owner information and terms of use.
notice.title: Legal Notice
notice.subtitle: Last update: March 2026

section1.title: 1. Owner details
section1.intro: In compliance with article 10 of Law 34/2002 on Information Society Services and Electronic Commerce, the following details are provided:

section2.title: 2. Website purpose
section2.text: AFV Cocinas is intended to present professional kitchen installation, design and renovation services and to enable contact between the professional and potential clients. Use of the website implies acceptance of these terms.

section3.title: 3. Intellectual and industrial property
section3.text1: All website contents are owned by the owner or by third parties with authorization.
section3.text2: Reproduction, distribution or transformation are prohibited without express permission.

section4.title: 4. Liability
section4.text1: The owner is not responsible for damages caused by website use or the presence of viruses.
section4.text2: Indicative estimates are for information only and are not a contractual offer.

section5.title: 5. Applicable law and jurisdiction
section5.text: These legal terms are governed by Spanish law. Disputes are submitted to Alicante courts.

privacy.metaDescription: AFV Cocinas privacy policy and personal data processing.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Last update: March 2026

section1.title: 1. Data controller
section1.text:
Data controller: Alberto F.V.
Address: Alicante province, Spain
Email: info@afvcocinas.es

section5.title: 5. Data retention
section5.text: Data is retained while necessary for the request and in legally required periods. Quotes and contracts: 5 years.

section6.title: 6. Third-party sharing
section6.text: Data is not shared with third parties except legal obligation. Resend is data processor for emails.

section7.title: 7. Rights
section7.contact: To exercise rights, email info@afvcocinas.es with subject 'Data protection'.

cookies.metaDescription: AFV Cocinas cookie policy. Cookies usage and management.
cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.subtitle: Last update: March 2026

section1.title: 1. What are cookies?
section1.text: Cookies are text files saved by the browser to remember your visit and improve experience.

cookieTable.name: _ga_*
cookieTable.purpose: Google Analytics session identifier (only with consent)

section3.title: 3. Technical cookies (required)
section3.text: Technical cookies are required for proper functioning and do not need consent.

section4.title: 4. Analytics cookies
section4.text: Analytics cookies measure visits and improve the site. Activated only with consent.

section5.title: 5. Manage or delete cookies
section5.text: Configure your browser to reject cookies or notify you on cookie submission.
section5.note: You may revoke consent at any time by clearing your browser cookies or using the banner 'Reject' button.

meta.title: Kitchen Installation & Design in Alicante
meta.description: Specialists in kitchen installation, renovation and design in Alicante. Over 15 years of experience and 500 completed projects. Free no-obligation quote.
meta.ogTitle: AFV Cocinas — Kitchen Installation & Design in Alicante
meta.ogDescription: Specialists in kitchen installation, renovation and design in Alicante. Over 15 years of experience.

hero.headline: Your kitchen
hero.description: We design and install kitchens across the province of Alicante. Quality, precision and attention to detail in every project.

assembly.title: Kitchen Installation
assembly.description: Professional installation with millimetre precision. From material delivery to the final adjustment, we guarantee a flawless fit.

design.title: Full Design
design.description: We create the space you have in mind. Personalised advice on layout, materials, finishes and appliances for your ideal kitchen.

sales.title: Direct Sales
sales.description: Direct access to the best brands in the industry. Top-quality furniture, worktops and appliances at the best price, with no middlemen.

parallax.phrase2: Quality you can see and feel

cta.heading: Your perfect kitchen
cta.description: Tell us about your project and we'll provide a personalised quote with no obligation. We reply within 48 hours.

meta.title: About Me
meta.description: Over 15 years installing and designing kitchens in the province of Alicante. Meet the professional behind AFV Cocinas.
meta.ogDescription: Over 15 years installing and designing kitchens in the province of Alicante. Meet the professional behind AFV Cocinas.

story.heading: Over 15 years transforming kitchens in Alicante
story.p1: My name is Alberto and I have spent over 15 years dedicated to kitchen installation and design in the province of Alicante. What began as a trade learned alongside my uncle has become my passion and my way of life.
story.p2: Over the years I have installed more than 500 kitchens, from intimate renovations in small flats to large installations in luxury homes. Every project is unique, and I am committed to treating it as if it were my own home.
story.p3: I work directly with the best brands on the market, which allows me to offer premium-quality materials at competitive prices. No middlemen, no surprises.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: We use premium-quality materials and precise installation techniques to guarantee a lasting, defect-free result.

punctuality.title: Punctuality
punctuality.description: We respect agreed deadlines. We know that a home renovation is disruptive, and we are committed to minimising that disruption.

trust.title: Trust
trust.description: Over 15 years of experience back our work. We operate with full transparency — no surprises in the final quote.

detail.title: Attention to detail
detail.description: Every millimetre counts. From perfect levelling to the finish on the plinths, we take care of every element of the installation.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Tell us about your project and we take note of your needs.

measure.title: Measurement
measure.description: We visit the space and take exact measurements for the quote.

quote.title: Quote
quote.description: Receive a detailed quote with no surprises or hidden costs.

install.title: Installation
install.description: We carry out the installation with precision within the agreed timeframe.

delivery.title: Handover
delivery.description: Final review with you and handover of your perfect kitchen.

cta.heading: Shall we talk about your kitchen?
cta.description: Tell me about your project and I'll give you my professional opinion with no obligation. I'm here to help.

meta.title: Our Kitchens — Portfolio
meta.description: Explore our portfolio of kitchens installed in Alicante: modern, rustic, minimalist and island kitchens. Over 500 completed projects.
meta.ogDescription: Explore our portfolio of kitchens installed in Alicante: modern, rustic, minimalist and island kitchens.

hero.heading: Our Kitchens
hero.description: Every kitchen is a unique project. Explore our portfolio and find inspiration for yours.

premium.title: Premium Quality
premium.description: We only work with top-of-the-range materials. Every kitchen is built to last decades without losing its original appearance.

function.title: Functionality
function.description: We design the space with your daily use in mind. Ergonomics, layout and practicality are our priority.

custom.title: Custom Design
custom.description: No two projects are the same. We adapt every kitchen to your space, your taste and your budget with complete freedom to personalise.

price.title: Competitive Pricing
price.description: By working directly with manufacturers, we cut out middlemen and offer you the best prices on the market.

approach.heading: We personalise every last detail
approach.body: Every kitchen we install begins with a conversation. We understand your space, your lifestyle and your vision before proposing any solution. The result is always a unique space, designed for you.

1.quote: From the very first moment, we knew we had chosen well. Alberto came to measure, suggested ideas we had not considered, and the final result exceeded all our expectations. The kitchen is simply perfect.

2.quote: We had been thinking about renovating the kitchen for years and always postponed it. In the end we decided to do it and we could not be happier. Impeccable work, punctual, and with a level of detail we did not expect at that price.

compacta-isla-marmol.name: Compact open kitchen with island
compacta-isla-marmol.description: A compact minimalist kitchen with a central island and marble worktop. Handleless matte fronts maximize visual cleanliness in the space. A project where functionality and elegance blend in every detail.
compacta-isla-marmol.materials: Handleless matte lacquer, white marble worktop

elegante-isla-vistas-mar.name: Elegant kitchen with island
elegante-isla-vistas-mar.description: Open-plan kitchen with a large-format island and premium finishes. The combination of natural wood and lacquered surfaces creates a warm and sophisticated atmosphere. Designed to enjoy cooking with privileged views.
elegante-isla-vistas-mar.materials: Natural wood, matte white lacquer, quartz worktop

moderna-blanca-peninsula.name: Modern kitchen with peninsula
moderna-blanca-peninsula.description: Clean-lined kitchen with an integrated peninsula that expands the work area and serves as a breakfast bar. Matte white finishes with a quartz worktop bring brightness to the space. A modern and practical design for everyday life.
moderna-blanca-peninsula.materials: Matte white lacquer, white quartz worktop

moderna-taupe-mesa.name: Modern taupe kitchen with table
moderna-taupe-mesa.description: Taupe-toned kitchen with an integrated table designed to bring the family together. Warm finishes and a thoughtful layout create a cozy space without sacrificing modernity. High-durability materials for intensive daily use.
moderna-taupe-mesa.materials: Taupe laminate, mineral compact worktop, lacquered table

negra-madera-roble.name: Black kitchen with oak wood
negra-madera-roble.description: Striking contrast between matte black fronts and natural oak wood. A bold design that balances contemporary and organic styles to create a kitchen full of personality. Premium finishes for a durable result.
negra-madera-roble.materials: Matte black lacquer, natural oak veneer, compact worktop

verde-salvia-marmol.name: Sage green kitchen with marble
verde-salvia-marmol.description: Sage green kitchen with a white marble worktop that brings character and distinction to the space. A trend-forward color that transforms the room into a unique setting full of personality. The marble pairing elevates the entire design to a premium level.
verde-salvia-marmol.materials: Matte sage green lacquer, white marble worktop

bottomCta.heading: Can't find what you're looking for?
bottomCta.description: Tell us your idea and we'll make it a reality. We work to measure, with no design limits.

step1.question: How many linear metres is your kitchen?
step1.hint: Add up all the runs: the main wall, sides and island if you have one.

step2.question: What type of worktop do you prefer?
step2.hint: The worktop material has a significant impact on the final price.

step3.question: Do we include appliances?
step3.hint: Oven, hob, extractor fan and integrated fridge.
step3.noSublabel: I have them or will buy separately

step4.question: What type of work do you need?
step4.hint: The scope of work is the factor that most influences the total price.
step4.montajeSublabel: Install the units you already have
step4.reformaSublabel: Demolition, building work, units and installation

result.disclaimer: Indicative price. The final quote depends on many factors: condition of the existing installation, access, specific materials and other details particular to your home.

cookies.text: We use our own cookies to improve your browsing experience.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The URL you opened does not exist or is no longer available. You can go back to the homepage and keep exploring our projects.
